calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Feb-23-2012 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tearsita Harris aka Tersita Martinezo is present.
Attorney Cindy Lee appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Raymond Mitchell, Ramon Mitchell, Delena Mitchell, Emmanuel Mitchell and Denise-Marie Mitchell are present.
Attorney Zach Toran representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of FEB-27-2012 is vacated.
